calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Asset
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Asset
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Louie for and with Glenn Fong (Trustee).

Mr. Lawrence stated that there are five accounts that the decedent did not have a chance to put into his Trust, that he has original bank statements from date of death, and that the Sister was on an account, but she died and the account passed to the Decedent. The Court waives notice and informed Counsel to file a supplement attaching said documents. The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee and Trust Asset is continued to December 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.
